executives.name: Ross McElroy
executives.background: Mr. McElroy is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been instrumental in several major uranium discoveries, including the Triple R deposit. He previously held positions with Cameco Corp., Areva, and BHP Billiton.

executives.name: Devinder Randhawa
executives.background: Founder of Fission Uranium and Fission Energy. Experienced in corporate finance and resource company management.

executives.name: Raymond Ashley
executives.background: Mr. Ashley has over 35 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He was formerly the Vice President, Exploration of Fission Uranium Corp. and Fission Energy Corp. He has been involved in several major uranium discoveries in the Athabasca Basin.
